create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Hierarchical Bookmarks in a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor, build a nested bookmark structure using Bookmark and Bookmarks collections, and save the document with the new hierarchy.

merge-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Merge Bookmarks from One PDF into Another
merge-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Shows how to extract the bookmark hierarchy from a source PDF and append it to a target PDF while preserving order using Aspose.Pdf facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, including their hierarchical levels, and write the title, destination, and level to a CSV file using Aspose.Pdf.

update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page 10
update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.description: Shows how to locate a bookmark by its title and change its destination to page 10 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from PDF
delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfBookmarkEditor and save the cleaned file.

delete-bookmark-and-verify-removal.title: Delete a Bookmark from PDF and Verify Removal
delete-bookmark-and-verify-removal.description: Shows how to remove a specific bookmark by its title using PdfBookmarkEditor and confirm the deletion by extracting and listing bookmarks before and after the operation.

add-top-level-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add Top-Level Bookmark to PDF
add-top-level-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor to create a top‑level bookmark that links to the first page and sets its title color to blue.

add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.title: Add Child Bookmarks to PDF Chapter
add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.description: Demonstrates how to create a parent bookmark and attach multiple child bookmarks representing sections within a chapter of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Nested JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract hierarchical bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and serialize them into a nested JSON structure.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor to export the full bookmark hierarchy from a PDF document into an XML file.

import-bookmarks-from-json-to-pdf.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into a PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON file, converting its structure to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and adding them to an existing PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF files and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-pdf-bookmark-count.title: Verify PDF Bookmark Count After Adding Bookmarks
verify-pdf-bookmark-count.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a bookmark for each page using PdfBookmarkEditor, saves the file, then reopens it to extract and validate the total number of bookmarks.

modify-pdf-bookmark-using-memorystream.title: Modify PDF Bookmark Using MemoryStream
modify-pdf-bookmark-using-memorystream.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with MemoryStream, change an existing bookmark title, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create bookmarks that open external web URLs in a PDF document.

update-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case with Proper Noun Preservation
update-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF bookmarks, convert each title to title case while keeping predefined proper nouns unchanged, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.description: Shows how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks Using Aspose.Pdf
collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to set the open state of bookmarks with a given title to collapsed in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.description: Demonstrates how to extract existing bookmarks, insert new pages at the beginning of a PDF, and recreate the bookmarks with updated page numbers to keep them accurate.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and write them to a plain‑text file, using indentation to preserve the bookmark hierarchy.

import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Import OFD Bookmarks into PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OFD file, create a bookmark for each page, and add those bookmarks to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that executes JavaScript code when clicked using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.description: Shows how to open password‑protected PDF files, remove all bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the modified documents to new files.

translate-pdf-bookmarks.title: Translate PDF Bookmarks Using Aspose.Pdf
translate-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to rename PDF bookmarks based on a translation dictionary by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Against Generated TOC
validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.description: The example extracts PDF bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, builds a simple table of contents by scanning page text with TextAbsorber, and compares the two to report missing or mismatched entries.

create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.title: Create Bookmarks for Images in a PDF
create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, locate images, and add a bookmark pointing to the page of each image using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-bookmark-zoom-level.title: Update Bookmark Zoom Level to 150% Magnification
update-bookmark-zoom-level.description: Shows how to modify PDF bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades so that each outline entry opens the page at 150% zoom.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV for Excel
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv__v2.description: Shows how to extract PDF bookmarks with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and write them to a CSV file that Excel can open, including title, hierarchy level, and destination page.

import-bookmarks-from-csv.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, construct a hierarchical bookmark structure, and add it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, identify and remove duplicates based on title and page number, and recreate a clean set of unique bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDFs in a folder and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor to add a "Reviewed" bookmark that points to the last page of each document, saving the modified files to an output directory.

add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add Colored Bookmarks to PDF Sections
add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create hierarchical PDF bookmarks with custom colors (red for warnings, green for information) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and writing each bookmark's title, level, and page number to a JSON file.

import-bookmarks-from-database.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-database.description: Shows how to read bookmark titles and page numbers from a database query result and add them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-bookmark-to-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
create-bookmark-to-named-destination.description: Shows how to add a named destination to a PDF and create a bookmark that references it using Aspose.Pdf facades.
